---
name: writer-latex-chinese-polish
description: polish Chinese academic prose embedded in LaTeX while preserving LaTeX commands, citation syntax, equations, and surrounding structural integrity.
---

Use this skill inside `writer` when the text is Chinese academic content embedded in LaTeX.

Before writing, read [references/prompt.md](references/prompt.md).

Core rules:

- improve Chinese academic readability
- do not damage LaTeX commands, math, labels, or citation syntax
- keep structural markers intact
- preserve facts and scope

Output:

- return the cleaned Chinese LaTeX prose
- do not add explanatory chatter
